description: Central registry of contributors to Tattva content. Each contributor has a unique ID and one or more roles. This file is the source of truth for attribution across all content files.

author.label: Author
author.description: Writes or substantially revises educational content. Responsible for accuracy, NCERT alignment, and pedagogical quality.

reviewer.label: Reviewer
reviewer.description: Reviews content for factual accuracy, NCERT alignment, pedagogical soundness, and completeness before publication.

editor.label: Editor
editor.description: Copy-edits for style, grammar, formatting, consistency, and accessibility. Ensures MDX formatting standards are met.

translator.label: Translator
translator.description: Creates or maintains translations of content in supported locales. Ensures linguistic accuracy and cultural appropriateness.

contributors.name: Tattva Community
contributors.bio: The collective author representing community-contributed content on the Tattva platform.

contributors.name: Dr. Ananya Sharma
contributors.bio: Physics educator with 12 years of experience teaching NCERT curriculum at senior secondary level. PhD in Condensed Matter Physics from IIT Delhi.

contributors.name: Prof. Raghavendra Joshi
contributors.bio: Retired Professor of Chemistry from Mumbai University. Specialises in physical chemistry and chemical thermodynamics. NCERT textbook review committee member (2015–2018).

contributors.name: Priya Menon
contributors.bio: Bilingual educator (English–Hindi–Marathi) specialising in science content translation. M.Sc. in Physics from Pune University. 8 years of teaching experience.

contributors.name: Vikram Patel
contributors.bio: Mathematics enthusiast and software engineer. Passionate about making quality math education accessible. B.Tech from IIT Bombay.

contributors.name: Dr. Kavitha Rajan
contributors.bio: Associate Professor of Biology at Chennai University. Research focus: molecular biology and genetics. 15 years of teaching NCERT Biology at +2 level.

contributors.name: Suresh Kulkarni
contributors.bio: Marathi language expert and former high school science teacher. 20 years of experience in educational content translation and localisation.

contributors.name: Meera Iyer
contributors.bio: Freelance science editor and writer. Former editorial team member at a leading educational publisher. Specialises in making technical content accessible and engaging.

contributors.name: Dr. Rajesh Kumar
contributors.bio: Senior Physics lecturer at Delhi University with 18 years of experience. Expert in mechanics and electromagnetism. Has reviewed multiple NCERT supplementary materials.

contributors.name: Aruna Subramaniam
contributors.bio: Tamil-language education consultant. Former NCERT regional coordinator for Tamil Nadu. Expert in pedagogical translation of science content.

contributionGuidelines.attributionPolicy: All contributors must be listed in the frontmatter of every content file they contribute to. The contributors.json registry serves as the central source of truth for contributor details.
contributionGuidelines.roleAssignment: Contributors may hold multiple roles. Roles are assigned based on the type of contribution and may be updated by project maintainers.
contributionGuidelines.recognition: Contributors are recognised on the platform's contributor page, in release notes, and in per-file frontmatter. Translation contributors are credited separately from source content authors.
contributionGuidelines.removalPolicy: Contributors may request removal of their personal information by contacting privacy@tattva.edu. Contribution records (without PII) are retained for attribution history.
